entity: 1984 NBA Draft #1 overall pick: Hakeem Olajuwon (HOU; the draft that also included Michael Jordan at #3 and Charles Barkley at #5)
notes: One of the most famous draft classes ever. The fixture pins the #1 pick (Olajuwon); Jordan (CHI, #3) and Barkley (PHI, #5) are in the same query result for cross-reference.
